title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Petroleum - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Petroleum - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Petroleum:
Bharat Petroleum is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
